name: Collect job posts with HTTP / REST API and MySQL hands-free

parameters.content:
### Hourly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 12 h. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Fetch Target Page

### Fetch Target Page

GET https://example-market.com/listings — retries 3× with backoff on failure.

Next: Extract Listings (CSS)

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 API key / bearer for the target API

### Extract Listings (CSS)

Extracts structured values from raw HTML via CSS selectors.

Next: Rows from Arrays

### Rows from Arrays

Custom JavaScript: Zip parallel arrays into one item per listing

Next: Diff vs Last Run

### Load Previous Snapshot

mySql — `select` operation against the connected account.

Next: Diff vs Last Run

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 MySQL connection

### Diff vs Last Run

Diffs two streams by key into 4 lanes: only-in-A, same, different, only-in-B — the heart of the sync.

Ports: ①→ Alert New Findings · ③→ Update Changed Rows · ④→ Write Fresh Snapshot

### Alert New Findings

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Diff Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

### Update Changed Rows

mySql — `insert` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Diff Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 MySQL connection

### Write Fresh Snapshot

mySql — `insert` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Diff Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 MySQL connection

### Merge Diff Outcomes

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

# Collect job posts with HTTP / REST API and MySQL hands-free

**Pattern:** Web Scraping · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Collect job posts with HTTP / REST API and MySQL hands-free. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual research is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Fetch Target Page → Extract Listings (CSS) → Rows from Arrays → Diff vs Last Run → Alert New Findings → Merge Diff Outcomes

## Use it for
- Teams that want to web scraping without manual effort
- Anyone automating research in data
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Removes copy-paste errors
- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Keeps your systems in sync

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; MySQL connection; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🧹 Data quality

Dedupe/diff steps make re-runs safe: the same input twice will not create duplicate records. If you change the key fields, clear n8n's dedupe memory (node → 'Clear stored keys') before the next run.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your research process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
